            31. Final hard verdict
30/04/2026, 01:14                                                            Attack Whitepaper Analysis




            The latest WIP is much more honest than earlier versions. It now says the right thing: the
            target tower is not the compact source, the scalar square is not orientation, the formal
            current envelope is not the source coalgebra, and normal-ordering is only a lattice
            correction until the chain-level Hall object exists. main main main
            But at the Beilinson standard, the paper must go one step further:
             Stop trying to unblock the compact theorem by algebraic target repacka

            The compact theorem is not unblocked.
            The only theorem-level results currently safe are:
                                                                  DX = Δ 5
                                                                         ​                 ​




            as virtual determinant;
                                                                         gΔ5       ​
                                                                                       ​




            as imported denominator target;
                                                                         ΓX    ​




            as normal-ordered degree correction;
                                                        raw fixed-lift descent no-go;
                                                              X              −2
                                                             ZOP /DT = −4096Δ5
                                                                    ​                           ​




            as imported scalar branch.
            Everything else is either a target reference, a conditional recognition statement, or an
            open compact realization problem.
            That is not a failure. It is the first honest version of the paper. The next breakthrough will
            not come from naming the missing object. It will come from constructing one finite
            geometric Hall stage and showing, with actual matrices and actual correspondence
            maps, that it satisfies even the first nontrivial slice of NO1–NO7.

            Here is the brutal conclusion first:
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa55c-63c4-83ea-b3fc-fc3666b5910f                                                             473/496
30/04/2026, 01:14                                               Attack Whitepaper Analysis

                                             The compact theorem is still not proved.        ​




            But the latest WIP has now narrowed the problem enough that we can replace vague
            certificates with an actual finite-stage construction protocol. The right standard is not
            “the constraints suggest it.” The right standard is:
                              finite stacks, finite bases, finite matrices, finite identities.   ​




            So below I give the construction architecture that actually closes the finite W≤3 source
            problem, while being explicit about what remains a genuine geometric theorem rather
                                                                                                     ​




            than a theorem-by-wish.

            1. Beilinson filter: what must be killed immediately
            Several ideas must die.
            First, Liu product stability does not automatically give fixed-class boundedness. The
            WIP itself says the exact missing theorem is finite-type boundedness for fixed full Liu
            numerical class γ = (v1, v2), and that Piyaratne–Toda boundedness for their
            BMT/threefold setting is not automatically this theorem. main
                                                  ​     ​




            Second, target arithmetic does not produce compact Hall matrices. The WIP’s W≤3
            arithmetic gives the target parity dimensions, including the first timelike 29∣93 block,
                                                                                                         ​




            but it explicitly says this does not give compact primitive bases, bracket constants,
            pairings, radicals, coproducts, or PBW matrices. main
            Third, the middle wall is not local over E . The wall δ2 ↔ (0, 1, 1) has positive elliptic
            degree; every geometric representative dominates E , so it must be constructed in an
                                                                               ​




            anchored wrapped or mixed stratum before quotienting by E . main
            Fourth, orientation descent is not a slogan. Point-stabilizer calculations close the
            orientation problem only after mixed Borel terms, stabilizer action on stratum
            cohomology, and spectral-sequence differentials vanish; finite-stabilizer H 1-
            linearization characters remain after degree-two gerbes vanish. main
            Fifth, eight binary words are not full factorization. The WIP correctly says the eight
            words LLL, LLW , LW L, W LL, LWW , W LW , WW L, WWW give binary
            associativity, but full hybrid factorization still needs higher colored configurations, units,
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa55c-63c4-83ea-b3fc-fc3666b5910f                                                   474/496
30/04/2026, 01:14                                                             Attack Whitepaper Analysis

            symmetry/order conventions, refinement maps, descent, and overlap coherences.
                    main

            So the right move is:
             construct a finite retained source slice, not the whole compact theory at once.               ​




            The first honest target is:
                                                                            W≤3 .​           ​




            2. The finite retained source: replace “boundedness” by an
            actual finite construction
            The full theorem
                                        Mss
                                         σs,t (γ) is finite type for every fixed full Liu class γ

            is still not proved. Do not pretend it is.

            parameter.
            Let H be an ample divisor on X = S × E . Fix:
                                                             R ∈ Z>0 ,  ​                N ∈ Z>0 ,   ​




            and a finite set of retained full Liu classes
                                                                Γret

                                                                            M[N
                                                                             γ
                                                                                ]

             1. F ∈ As,t , Liu’s product heart;

             4. F has Tor-amplitude in a fixed interval [a, b];
                                ​




             5. all cohomology sheaves Hi (F ) are N -regular with respect to H ;
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa55c-63c4-83ea-b3fc-fc3666b5910f                                                     475/496
30/04/2026, 01:14                                                                             Attack Whitepaper Analysis

             6. the Hilbert polynomials PH (F ) are fixed by γ ;

                the same N -regular bound.
            Then:
                                                                   M[N ]
                                                                    γ is finite type.
                                                                                    ​                             ​




            Proof: each Hi (F ) is a quotient of a fixed finite-rank vector bundle
                                                               OX (−N )⊕Mi ↠ Hi (F ),
                                                                    ​
                                                                                               ​




            with fixed Hilbert polynomial. Hence the possible cohomology sheaves lie in a finite
            product of Quot schemes. The extension data between a bounded finite collection of
            cohomology sheaves is bounded because the relevant Ext1-spaces form coherent
            sheaves over that finite product. Semistability is open in flat families in the retained
            heart. Therefore the retained stack is an open substack of a finite-type Artin stack.
            This gives a real finite object:
                                                                    R = ∐ Mγ .

                                            σs,t (γ) = ⋃ Mγ

                                           Mss         ​

                                                                   N

            That equality is exactly the missing Liu boundedness theorem. The WIP correctly names
            this as the missing product-boundedness theorem. main
            So the finite-source theorem becomes:
               Finite retained Liu theorem.
               For fixed R, N , ΓretR,N , the retained Liu semistable stack MR is finite type.
                                                                              ret

               If full fixed-class Liu boundedness is later proved, then for every fixed finite R there
                                                   ​                                                                       ​




               exists N (R) such that the retained stack equals the full R-window.
            This is rigorous. It does not lie.

            4. Actual wrapped middle wall object
            The middle type-II wall is the key place where handwaving dies.
            The root is
                                                             δ2 ↔ (n, l, m) = (0, 1, 1).
                                                               ​




            Under the OP/D6–D2–D0 dictionary,
                                                                           m = d − 1,

            so
                                                                                    d = 2.

            Therefore δ2 is genuinely wrapped over E . The WIP correctly proves it cannot be
            represented by projection-finite local support. main
                                ​




            Here is an explicit geometric model.
            Let S be an elliptic K3 with elliptic fibre F ⊂ S . Choose a degree-two isogeny
                                                                           φ : F → E.

            Let
                                                              Γφ ⊂ F × E ⊂ S × E
                                                                   ​




            be the graph. Then
                                                                           pE : Γφ → E
                                                                                ​        ​




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa55c-63c4-83ea-b3fc-fc3666b5910f                                                           478/496
30/04/2026, 01:14                                                                                       Attack Whitepaper Analysis

            has degree 2, so the curve has elliptic degree
                                                                                            d = 2.

            Choose a line bundle L on Γφ of degree 1. Since Γφ is elliptic,
                                                             ​                                                                   ​




                                                                  χ(L) = deg L = 1.

            Define the wrapped sheaf
                                                                            B2 := iΓφ ,∗ L.
                                                                                    ​


                                                                                                             ​
                                                                                                                     ​




            Then B2 has  ​




                                                             d = 2,                                 n = χ(L) = 1.

            The K3 projection class is [F ], hence h = 1 and h − 1 = 0. Thus the Gram label is
                                                    (h − 1, n, d − 1) = (0, 1, 1) = δ2 .                                             ​




            This gives an actual wrapped middle-wall representative.
            Now choose a smooth curve D ⊂ S meeting F transversely at a point x ∈ F such that
            φ(x) = e0 , and avoiding the other point of φ−1 (e0 ). Let
                              ​                                                                                              ​




                                                                   A2 := iD×{e0 },∗ M
                                                                                ​


                                                                                                                 ​
                                                                                                                         ​




            for a line bundle M on D. Then A2 and B2 meet transversely at exactly one point
                                                                        ​                           ​




                                                                        (x, e0 ) ∈ S × E.       ​




            Locally near that point,
                                                                 OX,(x,e0 ) ≅ C[[x, y, t]].
                                                                                        ​
                                                                                            ​




            Choose coordinates so that
                                                                   A2 :     ​                       x = t = 0,

            and
                                                                 B2 :
                                                                    ​               y = 0,                               t = x.

            Thus
                             OA2 = R/(x, t),
                                  ​
                                      ​                           OB2 = R/(y, t − x),
                                                                            ​
                                                                                ​                                                    R = C[[x, y, t]].

https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa55c-63c4-83ea-b3fc-fc3666b5910f                                                                                               479/496
30/04/2026, 01:14                                                                                      Attack Whitepaper Analysis

            Use the Koszul resolution of R/(x, t). Applying HomR (−, R/(y, t − x)), where                                         ​




                                                                 R/(y, t − x) ≅ C[[x]],

            gives the complex
                                                                           d0                                  d1
                                                        C[[x]]                                  C[[x]]2                         C[[x]],
                                                                                ​                                   ​




                                                                                            ​                               ​




            with
                                                                      d0 (f ) = (xf , xf ),
                                                                           ​




                                                                  d1 (a, b) = x(b − a).
                                                                       ​




            Then:
                                                                                                H 0 = 0,

                                          H 1 = {(a, a)}/{(xf , xf )} ≅ C[[x]]/(x) ≅ C,

                                                                 H 2 = C[[x]]/(x) ≅ C.

            Therefore
                                            Ext1 (A2 , B2 ) ≅ C,
                                                             ​    ​                                          Ext2 (A2 , B2 ) ≅ C.     ​   ​




            By the CY3 pairing, the reduced off-diagonal normal crossing is rank one after
            tangent/diagonal factors are removed.
            So the local wall object is
                                                                       Cδ 2 = A 2 ⊕ B 2 .
                                                                                    ​
                                                                                        ​                ​              ​




            This is the first genuinely constructive improvement over the WIP: the wrapped middle
            wall is not just an obligation; there is a concrete graph-of-isogeny model.
            What remains to prove:
             1. A2, B2 lie in the retained Liu heart for the chosen (s, t);
             2. they are semistable at the wall;
                       ​      ​




             3. the wall equality of phases is exactly δ2;
             4. the reduced Kuranishi chart has no additional normal directions;
                                                                                                   ​




             5. the orientation and anchor rigidification are compatible with the reduced E -
                 quotient.
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa55c-63c4-83ea-b3fc-fc3666b5910f                                                                                    480/496
30/04/2026, 01:14                                                                   Attack Whitepaper Analysis

            Without these five checks, this is a candidate wall object, not the completed O2
            theorem.

            5. Local Pfaffian normal form from the wall object
            For the wall object
                                                                    C =A⊕B

            with
                                               Ext1 (A, B) ≅ C,                             Ext2 (B, A) ≅ C,

            choose bases
                                                 u ∈ Ext1 (A, B),                           v ∈ Ext2 (B, A)

            dual under the CY3 pairing.
            The reduced Kuranishi potential near the split object has quadratic term
                                                             Wred = uv + higher terms.

            The wall reflection exchanges extension and coextension chambers. In the normal
            coordinate u, it acts by
                                                                                u ↦ −u.

            The normal determinant complex is
                                                                                            u
                                                                 Kδnor
                                                                    2
                                                                       = [R     ​               ​
                                                                                                    R].

            Equivalently, the odd skew block is
                                                                                     0 u
                                                                 Du = (                  ).
                                                                                    −u 0
                                                                    ​                   ​           ​




            Its Pfaffian is
                                                                   Pf(Du ) = u.     ​




            Thus
                                                                  s∗δ2 Pf = − Pf .
                                                                        ​
                                                                            ​

            This gives the local sign
                                                                             ϵloc

                                                                                                      ​




            The same construction works for δ1, δ3 once one supplies pairs
                                                                     ​               ​

                                                                                                          ​               ​




            with:
                                             Ext1 (Ai , Bi ) ≅ C,
                                                             ​   ​                                                Ext2 (Bi , Ai ) ≅ C,                    ​           ​




            and all other reduced off-diagonal normal directions killed or tangent.
            This is the exact local calculation the WIP abstracts as the rank-one crossing. Its local
            proof is valid, but the WIP is right to say the chart, reduced self-Ext complex, splitting,
            unit, and transition data are still geometric inputs. main

            6. Orientation class evaluation: explicit algorithm
            Let S0 be a connected stratum in a retained stack with finite stabilizer
                      ​




                                                                             G = E[N ].

            Let
                                                                                                  KR,S0           ​
                                                                                                                      ​




            be the reduced determinant complex on that stratum. Its determinant line is
                                                                 DR,S0 = Ber KR,S0 .     ​
                                                                                             ​


                                                                                                                                              ​
                                                                                                                                                  ​




            The equivariant square-root obstruction is the image of DR,S in                                                                                               0   ​
                                                                                                                                                                                  ​




                                                        PicG (S0 )/2 ⟶ HG2 (S0 ; F2 ).
                                                                         ​                                                            ​               ​       ​




            Use the Borel spectral sequence
                                         E2p,q = H p (BG; H q (S0 ; F2 )) ⇒ HGp+q (S0 ; F2 ).
                                                 ​                                                            ​               ​                                   ​                   ​




            The obstruction decomposes into:
                                                                  str
                                                                 αR,S 0
                                                                        ∈ H 2 (S0 ; F2 ),
                                                                             ​
                                                                                 ​                                                ​       ​

                                                           mix

                                                                 ∈ H 1 (BG; H 1 (S0 ; F2 )),
                                                                             ​
                                                                                 ​                                                                                                                  ​




                                                                          G
                                                                         βR,S 0
                                                                                ∈ H 2 (BG; F2 ),
                                                                                             ​
                                                                                                 ​                                                                                                      ​




            plus possible spectral-sequence differential corrections.
            The quotient orientation exists iff all total degree-two pieces vanish after differentials.
            For the point-stabilizer calculation, suppose G = (Z/2a)2, with generators g1, g2. Then                                                                                                                                                                 ​   ​




                                                 H ∗ (BG; F2 ) = Λ(x1 , x2 ) ⊗ F2 [y1 , y2 ],
                                                                                         ​                                                      ​                               ​                                           ​           ​               ​




            for a ≥ 2, and
                                                         H 2 (BG; F2 ) = F2 ⟨y1 , x1 x2 , y2 ⟩.              ​                                          ​                           ​           ​                   ​                   ​




            If the equivariant determinant character is
                                                                 g 1 ↦ ζ k1 ,
                                                                         ​

                                                                                                                                                            g 2 ↦ ζ k2 ,​
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ​




            and the projective cocycle contributes ϵ ∈ F2, then                                                                             ​




                                         G
                                        βR,S 0
                                               = (k1 mod 2)y1 + ϵx1 x2 + (k2 mod 2)y2 .
                                                 ​

            For G = E[2] ≅ (Z/2)2,
                                                         H 2 (BG; F2 ) = F2 ⟨x21 , x1 x2 , x22 ⟩,        ​                                          ​                               ​           ​                   ​                       ​




            and
                                                         βR,S0 = b20 x21 + b11 x1 x2 + b02 x22 .
                                                          E[2]
                                                                     ​                               ​                ​                                     ​                       ​       ​                                       ​           ​   ​



                                                                 ​

                                                                                                                 r1 = b20 ,
                                                                                                                          ​                                     ​

                                                                                                                          ​                                     ​

            Hence
                                                          β = 0 ⟺ r1 = r2 = r3 = 0.                                                   ​                                     ​                                   ​




            After β = 0, the remaining linearization character is
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa55c-63c4-83ea-b3fc-fc3666b5910f                                                                                                                                                                                                                  483/496
30/04/2026, 01:14                                                                             Attack Whitepaper Analysis

                                                     λ = λ1 x1 + λ2 x2 ∈ H 1 (BE[2]; F2 ),
                                                                 ​   ​            ​       ​                                 ​




            with restrictions
                                             ρ1 = λ 1 ,
                                                 ​           ​           ρ2 = λ 2 ,
                                                                             ​                 ​               ρ3 = λ 1 + λ 2 .
                                                                                                                 ​      ​       ​




            Trivial linearization requires
                                                                     ρ1 = ρ2 = ρ3 = 0.
                                                                         ​            ​                    ​




            This is the actual orientation-evaluation procedure. The WIP contains these cohomology
            formulas and correctly warns that finite-stabilizer degree-two gerbe data and degree-
            one linearization characters are different. main
            The dangerous sentence in the WIP is the claim that inner conjugation contributes no
            further H 1-term because conjugation has determinant 1 and trace/semiregularity
            summands are trivial. main
            That is too strong.
            Replace it by:
             The H 1 -term vanishes only after the stabilizer representation on every reduced tra

            In matrix form: for each stabilizer generator g, compute its action matrix
                                                                                          ρg       ​




            on every determinant summand, then compute
                                                             λ(g) = Ber1/2 (ρg ) ∈ {±1}.               ​




            The H 1-character vanishes iff
                                                                                 λ(g) = 1

            for all retained generators.
            No shortcut.

            7. Compactified hybrid correspondence stacks
            Define the retained local stack for a finite closed configuration I ⊂ E :

                                                Mloc           ret

            Define the wrapped anchor for a one-dimensional retained object F :
                                λ(F ) = det RpE,∗ F ⊗ OE (−χ(F ) ⋅ 0E ) ∈ Pic0 (E) ≅ E.
                                                                ​              ​                                                                   ​




            Define the rigidified wrapped stack:
                                   wr,rig                                                                                                              ∼

            For the middle wall δ2, the wrapped object B2 = iΓ ,∗L lies in such a stack with d = 2.
                                                ​                                                  ​




                                                                                                                                   φ   ​
                                                                                                                                           ​




            Now define three kinds of compactified extension stacks.
            Local-local
                                                                              ELL
                                                                               R,α,β                               ​




            classifies triangles
                                                                    Fβ → Fα+β → Fα
                                                                          ​                            ​                                   ​




            with all supports projection-finite over E .
            The compactification is the closed relative Quot/flag-Quot stack of retained subobjects
            inside a fixed output Fα+β .                ​




            Mixed
                                                                              ELW
                                                                               R,α;η                           ​




            classifies local input Fα , wrapped input Wη , and wrapped output Wα+η , together with
            an exact triangle
                                                    ​                              ​                                                                       ​




                                                                    Wη → Wα+η → Fα .
                                                                      ​                                    ​                                   ​




            The compactified fibre over a fixed output is a closed substack of the relative Quot
            stack of retained quotients whose local quotient has projection-finite support.
            Wrapped-wrapped
                                                                              EWW
                                                                               R,η1 ,η2        ​                       ​
                                                                                                                           ​




            classifies wrapped inputs and wrapped output with anchored exact triangles.
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa55c-63c4-83ea-b3fc-fc3666b5910f                                                                                                               485/496
30/04/2026, 01:14                                                                 Attack Whitepaper Analysis

            The anchor condition is imposed as a closed condition:
                                                      λ(Wη1 +η2 ) = λ(Wη1 ) + λ(Wη2 ).
                                                              ​   ​
                                                                      ​                               ​


                                                                                                                        ​
                                                                                                                            ​




            All correspondences are formed before reducing by E .
            For a generator
                                                                              p                           q
                                                             e = (Y               ​   Ee          ​           ​   Z),

            the operation is
                                                                                   ∗
                                                         BRE,geom (e) = q! ∘ TSred
                                                                          ​



                                                                               e ∘p .         ​




            The WIP already states this and correctly distinguishes raw exact triangles from the
            proper closed-filtration compactification; it says ordinary properness is not asserted for
            raw exact triangles, while the compact-support operation is supplied by the finite six-
            functor package. main
            The eight binary associativity stacks are:
                           LLL, LLW , LW L, W LL, LWW , W LW , WW L, WWW .

            For every word w, define
                                                                              Fw
                                                                               R          ​




            as the stack of two-step retained filtrations with local/wrapped type sequence w.
            Admissibility is:
                                    q is proper on compactified closed-filtration fibres,

                                         p∗ exists in the retained six-functor category,

                          q! preserves retained compact-support vanishing-cycle chains,
                             ​




                                 TSred is compatible with the reduced orientation line,

            and the two parenthesizations induce the same Borel–Moore class on
                                                                              Fw
                                                                               R.     ​




            This is the concrete hybrid atlas.

            12. What remains genuinely unclosed
            The following are not solved by the above; pretending otherwise would be false.
            Full Liu boundedness
            The retained N -regular finite stack is constructed. But full fixed-class Liu boundedness
            remains a theorem to prove.
            Needed theorem:
                                                                            [N (γ)]
                                                        ∃N (γ) Mss
                                                                σs,t (γ) = Mγ       .         ​
                                                                                                  ​                                ​




            The WIP explicitly says this is the missing product-boundedness theorem.                                                   main

            Actual wall objects for all three δi                                      ​




            The wrapped middle candidate B2 = iΓ ,∗L is explicit. The local Ext computation is
            explicit. But one must still prove semistability, wall equality, full charge matching,
                                                                          φ
                                                                  ​               ​


                                                                              ​




            quotient orientation, and no extra normal directions.
            Global orientation
            The class-evaluation algorithm is explicit. But actual values require actual stabilizer
            representations on every retained stratum.
            Full hybrid factorization

            The compactified binary correspondences are defined. But higher colored configuration
            coherences, units, symmetry/order conventions, overlap descent, and refinement maps
            remain.
            W≤3       ​   matrices
            The formula for M , D, B, G, K, Q is explicit. But actual numerical matrices require
            actual compact Borel–Moore/vanishing-cycle bases and actual integration over retained
            stacks.
            Source primitive comparison
            The recursive Aβ construction is explicit once the matrices exist. But it cannot be run
            without those source matrices.

            14. Final verdict
            The latest WIP has correctly identified the missing mathematics. The remaining danger
            is rhetorical overreach.
            The honest state is:
                                                   full compact theorem: not proved.               ​

             hybrid compactified correspondences: constructible via closed filtration/Quot stack

             W≤3 source recognition: reducible to explicit finite matrices M , D, B, G, K, Q.

            The Beilinson filter says: do not claim the full theorem until those matrices are computed
            from actual compact retained stacks.
            The next real advance is not another automorphic check. It is to produce the first
            nontrivial retained W≤3 source table: ​
